title: agropyron repens var. multiflorum
intro: Agropyron repens var. multiflorum, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Agropyron repens var. multiflorum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce oxidative stress, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a variety of applications in traditional medicine.
